div.div:
Bold name = repo exists; plain = planned. Bold orange = storage data path. Solid = data, dashed = control / provisioning / trust / audit.
The guest sandbox reaches only the egress hop; its actions are recorded host-side, so it cannot reach — or silence — the audit pipeline.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
